# Copilot Instructions

This repository uses Squad — an AI agent orchestration system — to autonomously process GitHub issues.

## How it works

1. When an issue is labeled `squad`, the full team is dispatched
2. Each agent analyzes the issue from their role's perspective
3. Results are posted back as issue comments
4. For coding tasks, @copilot can be assigned to implement changes

## Team

See `.squad/team.md` for the current team roster and roles.
See `.squad/routing.md` for issue routing rules.
